creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191142
Patch for arping v2.19

Hello,

attached is a patch which updates arping to 2.19.

New features are in contrary to 2.15:
- ability to create 802.1q tagged ARP packets
- define timeouts

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
